ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market open for the day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument for the day */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market close for the day */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed for the day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument for the day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of price volatility for the day */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync from the source */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sync (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
